name: Lentils Curried with Rhubarb and Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 Very large sweet potato, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover lentils with water in a deep pot. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and add raw sweet potato slices. Simmer until the potatoes are soft (about an hour).
3. Remove from heat, drain, and set aside.
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees. Heat oil in a skillet. Once hot, add rhubarb.
5. Cook rhubarb until tender. Stir in sweetener and seasonings.
6. Mix with drained cooked lentils and mashed potatoes (combined with a fork).
7. Pour into an oven-proof dish and bake at 400 degrees until piping hot (about 20 minutes).
8. Garnish with shredded coconut. Serve with chutney and brown rice.
Total Calories Per Serving: 264
Fat: 6 grams
